creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Learn how to make pasta like a pro at @sagra.dubai!

This pasta-making class was all about transforming simple ingredients into perfect flat pasta. From mixing the dough to shaping each piece, we learned from the expert - Chef Tala, and took a delicious journey through the heart of Italian cuisine.

We took home our own pasta and got the recipe so we can recreate it anytime we crave for fresh and delicious pasta dishes! We also had a taste of Sagra’s fresh homemade pasta! 

🗓️ Book your spot at Sagra’s instagram page. Advance reservation recommended. 
🎟️ AED 250 per person
